targets.title: Improve the pending 7,193-point Sidon set in the 24-cube
targets.why: Accepted state records 7,179 points, while a mechanically verified 7,193-point witness remains pending review; useful new evidence must reach at least 7,194 without repeating the existing exchange.
targets.objective: Produce one explicit Sidon subset of {0,1}^24 with more than 7,193 points. A bounded failure is run evidence only and cannot claim maximality.
